text:

I'm the Perl module maintainer.
It will use the Crypt::SSLeay in https when login the site:www.emome.net,
so Crypt::SSLeay is required in SMS::Send::TW::emome.
 
Please commit it.
Thanks.


Best Regards,
snowfly.
